value.body:
## Context

Agents will discover out-of-scope issues while implementing a ticket. They need a governed way to capture those issues without derailing the active task or creating low-quality duplicates.

## Outcome

Agents can propose or create follow-up tickets with duplicate checks, parent/dependency links, evidence, and user-visible review state.

## Acceptance criteria

- MCP supports creating follow-up tickets linked to the source ticket and run.
- Duplicate detection checks title/text similarity and existing dependency/related links before creation.
- Follow-up tickets include evidence, scope boundary, suggested priority, and whether they block the current ticket.
- Policy controls whether follow-ups are auto-created, created as drafts, or require approval.
- Tests cover duplicate detection, linking, blocking follow-ups, and approval-policy behavior.

frontmatter.title: Add safe agent-created follow-up ticket workflow

value.title: Add safe agent-created follow-up ticket workflow
